front: Describe the mechanism of mucosal vaccine delivery using nanoparticles.
back: Mucosal nanoparticles target M cells in Peyer patches or nasal-associated lymphoid tissue. Chitosan and PLGA nanoparticles enhance antigen uptake. Adjuvants (CpG, MPLA) co-delivered for immune stimulation. Enables mucosal IgA response plus systemic immunity.
